回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 進修部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(二) (English(ll))	開課班級 : 進大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 劉素勳	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Enhance skills in English Readings and conversation in various fields with informative texts covering a variety of topic. It seeks to help students build up vocabulary and presentation skills, identify main ideas and analyze key concepts in readings. All in all, it aims to develop students’ reading comprehension, vocabulary skills, critical thinking, and to promote cross-cultural communication 


2.教學綱要
Extensive English readings in various fields as well as English Conversation. Assignments, Group discussions and presentations are crucial to this course. 


3.教科書

出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
50% attendance, class discussion, presentation, quiz and homework, 25% midterm exam, 25% final exam 
Grades would be deducted for any following reasons: late for class, absence, lack of textbook, using cell phone.  
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
